name: the red-team pack binds to a deterministic digest of the reviewed artifact
command: printf 'resource x {}\n' > a.tf && a=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));process.stdout.write(j.artifact_digest)'); b=$(bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/redteam-review.sh" --artifact a.tf --emit json 2>/dev/null | node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync(0,"utf8"));process.stdout.write(j.artifact_digest)'); [ -n "$a" ] && [ "$a" = "$b" ] && echo w13-artifact-digest 1>&2
